title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same operations as Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedding provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG uploads.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Rust; browse, pull, chat, manage models without leaving the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; ingest PDFs and chat over documents locally.

title: ollama-nim-sdk
summary: Native Nim SDK for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, list models with async API.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, dependency injection helpers, and minimal API samples.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama inside a container pipeline for CI-based LLM testing.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes via Ollama (summarize, translate, rewrite).

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot server that answers channel mentions using any Ollama model; deploy with one Docker env file.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform provider to manage Ollama models (pull, delete, tag) as code.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama’s REST API with GenServer-friendly streaming.

title: ollama-sd-webui
summary: Extension for AUTOMATIC1111 Stable-Diffusion-WebUI that uses Ollama for prompt generation and interrogation.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot that streams Ollama responses in embeds with slash commands and optional moderation.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.
